temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, cluttered room, a man with a blonde mustache (Lucius Malfoy) and a man with a dark mustache (Dolph Lundgren) both point wands at a young man (Draco Malfoy). The blonde man shouts a command, and a green light flashes, causing the young man to recoil in pain. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation, establishing that Draco Malfoy is being forcefully disarmed by two other men, Lucius Malfoy and an associate.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, sharp magical sound effect accompanies the spell.)
(00:03-00:07) The scene cuts to a high-angle shot, showing the three men on the floor amidst the debris. The blonde man (Lucius Malfoy) and the man with the dark mustache (Dolph Lundgren) are on their knees, while the young man (Draco Malfoy) lies on his back, clutching his stomach in agony. The blonde man shouts another spell. (Storyline: The aftermath of the initial confrontation is shown, with Draco Malfoy incapacitated on the floor, having been tortured by the two men.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Aggressive, menacing. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of a spell being cast is heard, along with the thud of the characters falling.)
